codeReview.summary: Commit d24367d cleanly resolves the prior lockfile mismatch. The only code change updates `bun.lock` so the `packages/web` workspace now records `vite: ^7.0.0` at bun.lock:50, matching `packages/web/package.json:29`; the stale `^7.3.1` workspace spec flagged in the prior review is gone, while the resolved package entry remaining at `vite@7.3.1` is a valid resolution under `^7.0.0`. The transcript skeleton and handoff also show the worker reran `bun install`, both package test suites, and both typechecks, so the fix fully addresses the blocking issue from `fix-vite-version-mismatch`.

summary: Pass. The rerun fix updates `bun.lock` to match the final web manifest and removes the only blocking issue left by `fix-vite-version-mismatch`; no blocking or non-blocking code issues remain in this feature review.
